corrections.text: The article attributes this quotation to Konrad Viebahn: "Unlike dynamical phases, this geometric phase is largely independent of the speed with which we manipulate the atoms." The full quote, as it appears in both the ETH Zurich press release and The Quantum Insider, is: "Unlike dynamical phases, this geometric phase is largely independent of the speed with which we manipulate the atoms, or how strongly the laser intensity fluctuates during the process." The omitted clause directly describes the laser-noise robustness that is the central claim of the paper.
